intro.speaker: Fern
intro.text: Oh! A visitor! I don't get many of those. Welcome to my little room.

ask.speaker: Fern
ask.text: I've been rearranging all day. Be honest — how does the place look?

happy.speaker: Fern
happy.text: Aw, you're sweet! The rug really ties it together, doesn't it?

dusty.speaker: Fern
dusty.text: Dusty?! ...Okay, fair. The broom and I aren't on speaking terms.

bye.speaker: Fern
bye.text: Come back any time. I'll put the kettle on!

again.speaker: Fern
again.text: Back so soon? The kettle's still warm. Make yourself at home.
